arts.ttl: Two more Norwich games moved to allow for TV coverage
arts.sum: Norwich City's matches against Bristol City and Sheffield Wednesday have been moved to allow for Sky Sports television coverage of the former.

arts.ttl: Preview: Hull City vs. Norwich City - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Championship clash between Hull City and Norwich City, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Norwich City hit by fitness worries to key men ahead of crucial Hull City trip
arts.sum: Norwich will also be without Emi Marcondes, and there are some doubts surrounding influential skipper Kenny McLean after he was forced to miss the defeat in midweek shortly before kick-off in Norfolk, while Onel Hernandez is back in light training but won't be risked. Boss Johannes Hoff Thorup says influential forward Marcelino Nunez, who bagged the first goal in the 4-0 thumping against the Tigers in October, will be sidelined with a sore ankle.
